items.title: Iranian strikes on bases used by US caused $800m in damage, new analysis shows
items.summary: Much of the damage was caused in initial retaliatory strikes by Iran in the week after the US and Israel launched its operation.

items.title: Thousands evacuated as Hawaii faces worst flooding in 20 years
items.summary: More than 230 people have been rescued so far, the authorities said on Friday.

items.title: Pentagon restrictions on press violate First Amendment, judge rules
items.summary: The Department of Defense had required reporters to agree to certain rules on what information they could gather in order to maintain access to the Pentagon.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 「川習會」陷僵局！ 傳待伊朗戰事降溫  川普政府才願安排
items.summary: 美國Politico政治新聞網站21日獨家報導，隨著美國向波斯灣增兵、伊朗戰事升溫，原定3月底舉行的「川習會」陷入僵局。據多名知情人士透露，川普政府已向外國官員表明，在伊朗戰...…

items.title: 應對台海變局 英軍事專家：台灣可借鏡荷姆茲海峽經驗
items.summary: 中東戰火持續，英國智庫「皇家聯合軍事研究所」（RUSI）印太區域安全高階研究員薛特爾-瓊斯接受中央社採訪表示，台灣可從密切追蹤、縝密研究荷姆茲海峽正在發生的事汲取寶貴教訓，為應對台灣海峽未來...…

items.title: 不只哈格島！ 波斯灣這「3小島」也是伊朗海上堡壘
items.summary: 在國際關注美國總統川普是否派兵，奪佔伊朗石油出口樞紐哈格島（Kharg Island）之際，波斯灣另外三座面積不大的島嶼，也可能隨著美軍出動地面部隊，而成為外界關注焦點。  ...…
